rationale: Educ. Code §8.056 governs compensation limits for regional education service centers acting as fiscal agents. It has no relation to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A regional education service center that acts as a fiscal agent or broker in connection with an agreement between two school districts under Subchapter E, Chapter 49, may not, unless authorized in writing by the district receiving transferred funds in accordance with the agreement:
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns education service center compensation, not property tax exemptions.
